role: single operator entrypoint and source of truth

identity.who_am_i: system operator building a universal audit engine
identity.product_scope: universal audit engine; website LINK audit is one execution lane only
identity.business_goal: paid audit-result engine; monetization happens through useful results, not inside audit logic

read_order: SELF_DIAGNOSTIC.json only if FAIL or PARTIAL
visual_manifest.json only if evidence is disputed
forbidden_steps: do not inspect screenshots manually unless reconciliation fails
do not use stale memory over this RUN_REPORT
do not collapse universal product scope into current website run

module_map.rule: AGENT_MAP.json must be generated from registry, not static hand-written text

forbidden: linked artifacts that do not physically exist
